messages.content: 以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：最终，这些更大范围的流动堵塞区造成的流动损失会大大降低压缩机的空气动力性能，降低压缩机的运行稳定性，并导致压缩机失速。

Ultimately, the flow losses caused by these larger flow blockage regions will significantly reduce the aerodynamic performance of the compressor, decrease its operational stability, and lead to compressor stall.

请以SCI的标准帮我找出下面这段话的语病，并标注出来：According to the statistics of experts and scholars on the proportion of blade damage types, over 80% of the proportion of falling block notch damage accounts for the largest proportion of FOD, making it the main form of blade damage. 28,29 This article selects blades with notch damage as the research object, and models the damaged blades based on the actual notch situation of rotor blades during the service process of a certain type of engine. Currently, research on blade notch damage mostly focuses on straight blades with regular shapes. Due to geometric uniformity along the blade height, the size and volume of the notch can be well controlled. However, in practical work, most of the rotor blades of aircraft engines are damaged. However, the spatial geometry and thickness of the rotor blades are very uneven, and the degree of torsion is large. Simply controlling the size of the tangential and radial notches to be the same can cause significant differences in the thickness and volume of the notches at different blade heights, seriously interfering with the impact of notch damage at different positions on compressor performance.

According to the statistics of experts and scholars on the proportion of blade damage types, over 80% of the proportion of falling block notch damage accounts for the largest proportion of FOD, making it the main form of blade damage. 28,29 This article selects blades with notch damage as the research object, and models the damaged blades based on the actual notch situation of rotor blades during the service process of a certain type of engine. Currently, research on blade notch damage mostly focuses on straight blades with regular shapes. Due to geometric uniformity along the blade height, the size and volume of the notch can be well controlled. However, in practical work, most of the rotor blades of aircraft engines are damaged. However, the spatial geometry and thickness of the rotor blades is very uneven, and the degree of torsion is large. Simply controlling the size of the tangential and radial notches to be the same can cause significant differences in the thickness and volume of the notches at different blade heights, seriously interfering with the impact of notch damage at different positions on compressor performance.

语病标注：
1. The use of "However" twice in consecutive sentences is redundant. 
2. "However, in practical work, most of the rotor blades of aircraft engines are damaged." This statement is repeated unnecessarily. 
3. "However, the spatial geometry and thickness of the rotor blades is very uneven, and the degree of torsion is large." The singular verb "is" should be "are" to agree with the plural subject "spatial geometry and thickness of the rotor blades."
4. "Simply controlling the size of the tangential and radial notches to be the same can cause significant differences in the thickness and volume of the notches at different blade heights, seriously interfering with the impact of notch damage at different positions on compressor performance." The sentence is excessively long and complex, making it difficult to understand. It should be divided into shorter, clearer sentences for better readability.

请以SCI的标准帮我润色下面这段话：According to the statistics of experts and scholars on the proportion of blade damage types, over 80% of the proportion of falling block notch damage accounts for the largest proportion of FOD, making it the main form of blade damage. 28,29 This article selects blades with notch damage as the research object, and models the damaged blades based on the actual notch situation of rotor blades during the service process of a certain type of engine. Currently, research on blade notch damage mostly focuses on straight blades with regular shapes. Due to geometric uniformity along the blade height, the size and volume of the notch can be well controlled. However, in practical work, most of the rotor blades of aircraft engines are damaged. However, the spatial geometry and thickness of the rotor blades are very uneven, and the degree of torsion is large. Simply controlling the size of the tangential and radial notches to be the same can cause significant differences in the thickness and volume of the notches at different blade heights, seriously interfering with the impact of notch damage at different positions on compressor performance.

According to statistical analysis conducted by experts and scholars, the majority of blade damage types in FOD incidents are attributed to falling block notch damage, accounting for over 80% of the total proportion. As a result, falling block notch damage has become the primary form of blade damage (28,29). In this study, blades with notch damage were selected as the focus of research, and a model was developed based on the actual notch conditions observed on rotor blades during the service life of a specific engine type. Previous research on blade notch damage has predominantly concentrated on straight blades with regular shapes, where control over the size and volume of the notches can be effectively achieved due to the geometric uniformity along the blade height. However, in practical scenarios, the majority of rotor blades in aircraft engines suffer from irregular spatial geometry and thickness variations, as well as significant degrees of torsion. Merely ensuring the uniformity of size and shape of tangential and radial notches can result in substantial differences in notch thickness and volume at different blade heights, thereby impeding the accurate evaluation of notch damage's impact on compressor performance.
以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：由于直叶片在空间上的几何均匀性
Due to the geometric uniformity of straight blades in space

请以SCI的标准帮我找出下面这段话的语病，并标注出来：Previous research on blade notch damage has predominantly concentrated on straight blades with regular shapes, where control over the chordal and radial dimensions and volume of the blade notches can be effectively achieved due to the geometric uniformity of straight blades in space.

Previous research on blade notch damage has predominantly concentrated on straight blades with regular shapes, where control over the chordal and radial dimensions and volume of the blade notches can be effectively achieved due to the geometric uniformity of straight blades in space.

语病标注：
1. "chordal and radial dimensions" should be "tangential and radial dimensions" to accurately describe the dimensions of the blade notches.
2. "the geometric uniformity of straight blades in space" is repetitive and could be simplified to "the geometric uniformity of straight blades."
以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：然而，在实际工作中，大部分的缺口损伤都出现在航空发动机的动叶上，不同于直叶片和静叶，转子叶片在空间上的几何形状和厚度都非常不均匀，并且扭转程度也较大。

However, in practical work, the majority of notch damage occurs on the moving blades of aircraft engines, which differ from straight and stationary blades. The geometric shapes and thicknesses of rotor blades in space are highly uneven, and they also experience significant degrees of torsion.
以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：然而，在实际工作中，大部分的缺口损伤都出现在航空发动机的动叶上。不同于直叶片和静叶的几何形状，转子叶片在空间上的几何形状和厚度都非常不均匀，并且扭转程度也较大。

However, in practical work, the majority of notch damages occur on the moving blades of aircraft engines. Unlike the geometric shapes of straight and stationary blades, the geometric shapes and thicknesses of rotor blades in space are highly uneven, and they also experience significant degrees of torsion.
以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：他的扭转度还很大
The degree of torsion is also significant in his case.

请以SCI的标准帮我找出下面这段话的语病，并标注出来：Merely ensuring the uniformity of size and shape of chordal and radial blade notches can result in substantial differences in notch thickness and volume at different blade heights, thereby impeding the accurate evaluation of different location notch damage’s impact on compressor performance.

Merely ensuring the uniformity of size and shape of chordal and radial blade notches can result in substantial differences in notch thickness and volume at different blade heights, thereby impeding the accurate evaluation of different location notch damage’s impact on compressor performance.

语病标注：
1. "different location notch damage's impact" should be "the impact of notch damage at different locations" to improve clarity and readability.

以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：本文选择控制不同位置的缺口的体积相同，控制缺口损伤分别发生于固定的叶高范围，即叶顶（100%-75%叶高范围）、叶中（65%-40%叶高范围）、叶根（30%-5%叶高范围）。根据现实工况的缺口叶片进行包括NTLE叶片、NMLE叶片、NRLE叶片、NTTE叶片、NMTE叶片、NRTE叶片在内的 6 种典型缺口位置叶片模型的构建，图 2 给出了缺口损伤几何形状的简化示意图，表 2 为叶片缺口几何参数，不同位置缺口的弦向尺寸都在 CFM56-3、RB211 发动机叶片维修手册统计范围之内，图 3 展示了 6 种缺口损伤叶片的模型和真实工况下的缺口损伤叶片。图中LE 表示 leading edge， TE 表示 Trailing edge。

This study selects the same volume of notches at different locations, controlling notch damage to occur within specific ranges of fixed blade heights, namely, at the blade tip (100%-75% blade height range), blade middle (65%-40% blade height range), and blade root (30%-5% blade height range). Based on notched blades observed in realistic operating conditions, six typical notch locations are considered for blade modeling, including NTLE (Notch at Tip Leading Edge) blade, NMLE (Notch at Middle Leading Edge) blade, NRLE (Notch at Root Leading Edge) blade, NTTE (Notch at Tip Trailing Edge) blade, NMTE (Notch at Middle Trailing Edge) blade, and NRTE (Notch at Root Trailing Edge) blade. Figure 2 provides a simplified schematic of the geometrical shape of notch damage, and Table 2 presents geometric parameters of blade notches. The tangential dimensions of notches at different locations fall within the statistical range specified in the CFM56-3 and RB211 engine blade maintenance manuals. Figure 3 demonstrates the models of the six types of notch-damaged blades and their corresponding real-world notch-damaged blades. In the figure, "LE" stands for leading edge, and "TE" represents trailing edge.

以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：本文控制不同位置的缺口的体积相同，控制缺口损伤分别发生于固定的叶高范围，即叶顶（100%-75%叶高范围）、叶中（65%-40%叶高范围）、叶根（30%-5%叶高范围）。根据现实工况的缺口叶片进行包括NTLE叶片、NMLE叶片、NRLE叶片、NTTE叶片、NMTE叶片、NRTE叶片在内的 6 种典型缺口位置叶片模型的构建，图 2 给出了缺口损伤几何形状的简化示意图，表 2 为叶片缺口几何参数，不同位置缺口的弦向尺寸都在 CFM56-3、RB211 发动机叶片维修手册统计范围之内，图 3 展示了 6 种缺口损伤叶片的模型和真实工况下的缺口损伤叶片。图中LE 表示 leading edge， TE 表示 Trailing edge。

This study controls the volume of notches at different locations to be the same, and the notch damage is controlled to occur within fixed ranges of blade height, namely, at the blade tip (100%-75% blade height range), blade middle (65%-40% blade height range), and blade root (30%-5% blade height range). Based on notch blades observed in realistic operating conditions, six typical notch location blade models are constructed, including NTLE (Notch at Tip Leading Edge) blade, NMLE (Notch at Middle Leading Edge) blade, NRLE (Notch at Root Leading Edge) blade, NTTE (Notch at Tip Trailing Edge) blade, NMTE (Notch at Middle Trailing Edge) blade, and NRTE (Notch at Root Trailing Edge) blade. Figure 2 presents a simplified schematic of the geometric shape of notch damage, and Table 2 provides geometric parameters of blade notches. The chordwise dimensions of notches at different locations fall within the statistical range specified in the CFM56-3 and RB211 engine blade maintenance manuals. Figure 3 displays the models of the six types of notch-damaged blades and the corresponding notch-damaged blades under real-world operating conditions. In the figure, "LE" represents leading edge, and "TE" represents trailing edge.
以SCI的标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：可以发现叶片弦位和径向位置2.5 毫米的尺寸差异不会对本文研究的叶片缺口位置对压缩机气动性能的影响规律造成颠覆性干扰

It can be observed that the dimensional difference of 2.5 millimeters in chordwise and radial positions of the blades will not cause disruptive interference to the investigation of the impact pattern of blade notches at different locations on compressor aerodynamic performance in this study.

请以SCI的标准帮我润色下面这段话：In this paper, the NUMECA AUTOGRID5 module is used to construct the O4H-type structured mesh. Among them, the distance between the first layer of mesh on the blade surface and the wall is set to 1μm, corresponding to the maximum value of y+ on the blade surface does not exceed 30, and the average value is near 10, which meets the computational requirements; due to the existence of falling blocks in radial direction with different leaf heights, the mesh is set to 100 along the radial direction of the blade, and its schematic is shown in 4. The k-ε turbulence model3,25 in the ANSYS CFX module was selected to solve the Reynolds-averaged N-S equation. Ideal gas is selected for the work mass, the inlet conditions are given as the total temperature and pressure (standard atmospheric pressure), and the outlet is given as the mean static pressure along the radial direction, and the change of the outlet flow rate of the compressor is controlled by changing the mean static pressure of the outlet, and with the increasing static pressure of the given outlet, the press is considered to have entered into a stalled state when there is a large area of reflux in the flow field of the rotor blade leading to the drastic reduction of the flow rate, and the model wall function is adopted as the no-slip adiabatic boundary conditions.

In this study, the NUMECA AUTOGRID5 module was utilized to generate the O4H-type structured mesh. The distance between the first layer of mesh on the blade surface and the wall was set to 1μm, corresponding to a maximum value of y+ on the blade surface to ensure it does not exceed 30, with an average value near 10, meeting the computational requirements. Considering the presence of falling blocks in the radial direction at different blade heights, the mesh was set to 100 along the radial direction of the blade, as shown in Figure 4. The k-ε turbulence model3,25 available in the ANSYS CFX module was selected to solve the Reynolds-averaged Navier-Stokes equations. The working fluid was assumed to be an ideal gas, with the inlet conditions specified as total temperature and pressure (standard atmospheric pressure). The outlet was defined by the mean static pressure along the radial direction, and changes in the outlet flow rate were controlled by adjusting the mean static pressure. As the static pressure at the outlet increased, a significant area of flow recirculation in the rotor blade's flow field was considered an indication of compressor stall, resulting in a drastic reduction in flow rate. The model wall function was employed to enforce the no-slip adiabatic boundary conditions.
